title: Family Expenses - Flutter Mobile App
description: Build Flutter mobile app with local SQLite storage, all features from web app. Targets iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Android.

stories.title: Project Setup & Repo Creation
acceptanceCriteria: Private GitHub repo 'family-expenses-mobile' created under nghiack7
Flutter project initialized with package name com.nghia.familyexpenses
pubspec.yaml has dependencies: sqflite, path, intl, fl_chart, provider, speech_to_text, http, share_plus, csv, uuid
flutter build apk runs without errors
macOS platform enabled

stories.title: SQLite Database Layer
acceptanceCriteria: DatabaseHelper class initializes SQLite on first call
Tables: profile (singleton), family_members, categories, expenses
8 default categories seeded: Ăn uống, Di chuyển, Mua sắm, Hóa đơn, Giải trí, Sức khỏe, Giáo dục, Khác
insertExpense, updateExpense, deleteExpense work correctly
getMonthlyTotal, getDailyAverage, getByCategory, getByMember return correct aggregations
Each expense has sync_status field for future sync

stories.title: Theme System & i18n
acceptanceCriteria: AppTheme.light() uses Indigo primary #6366F1, Emerald accent #10B981
AppTheme.dark() uses dark variants of same palette
Be Vietnam Pro font loaded via google_fonts or bundled
AppLocalizations has all strings from web app translations object (vi + en)
ThemeProvider persists theme choice to SharedPreferences
LocaleProvider persists language choice to SharedPreferences

stories.title: Tab Navigation & Onboarding
acceptanceCriteria: BottomNavigationBar with 4 tabs: Tổng quan, Thêm, Lịch sử, Gia đình
Each tab has correct icon
First launch shows OnboardingScreen (name + currency + optional members)
Profile saved to SQLite profile table
Subsequent launches go directly to main app
AppBar shows theme toggle and language toggle

stories.title: Add Expense Screen
acceptanceCriteria: AmountInput formats with thousand separators as user types (e.g., 1.500.000)
VND preview label shows readable units (150 nghìn, 1,5 triệu, 2 tỷ)
CategoryPicker shows grid of categories with emoji icons
DatePicker defaults to today, allows selecting past dates
MemberPicker dropdown shows family members
Description TextField
Submit validates amount>0 and category selected, saves to SQLite, shows SnackBar
Form resets after successful submit

stories.title: Dashboard Screen
acceptanceCriteria: Card shows total spending this month formatted with currency
Card shows daily average
Card shows biggest category name and amount
BarChart shows daily spending for current month (fl_chart)
PieChart shows spending by category with legend
BarChart shows spending by member
Recent expenses list shows last 5 items
Month-over-month comparison shows percentage change

stories.title: History Screen
acceptanceCriteria: ListView of expenses with date headers (grouped by day)
Each item shows: category icon, description, amount, member name
Filter chips: category dropdown, member dropdown, date range picker
Swipe left to delete with confirmation dialog
Tap opens edit form (pre-filled), save updates SQLite
Pagination: loads 20 at a time, 'Load more' button or infinite scroll

stories.title: Family/Settings Screen
acceptanceCriteria: Profile section: edit name, currency picker with common currencies
Members section: list members, add new member (name), delete member
Categories section: list custom categories, add new, delete
Appearance: theme toggle switch, language toggle switch
Export: button generates CSV of all expenses, opens share sheet
AI Settings: provider picker (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google), model text field, API key secure field

stories.title: Voice Input
acceptanceCriteria: Mic FAB on Add Expense screen
speech_to_text captures Vietnamese speech
VoiceParser extracts: amount (handles nghìn/triệu/tỷ/k), description, category guess
Auto-fills amount, description, category fields from parsed result
UI states: idle, listening (animated), processing, filled
Error handling: permission denied, no speech detected, not supported

stories.title: AI Financial Advisor
acceptanceCriteria: AI section accessible from Family/Settings screen
Analyze button sends current month expenses to configured AI provider
HTTP POST to OpenAI/Anthropic/Google API with user's API key
Response parsed and displayed: health score badge, key insights list, tips list
Free-form question TextField appended to AI prompt
Loading state while waiting for AI response
Error handling: invalid API key, network error, empty data

stories.title: App Polish & Store Readiness
acceptanceCriteria: Custom app icon (wallet/money theme, indigo color)
Splash screen with app logo
HapticFeedback on expense add, delete, tab switch
Page transitions use MaterialPageRoute or CupertinoPageRoute
flutter build apk --release succeeds
flutter build ios --release succeeds (or no-codesign for CI)
flutter build macos succeeds
README.md in repo with setup instructions
